latin: Duo quondam amici gladiis ardentibus inter flammas pugnabant. qui supra stabat clamavit: 'locum superiorem teneo! ne temptes!' sed alter tamen saltavit — et graviter vulneratus est.

questions.prompt: What is the relationship between the two fighters?
What happened when the lower fighter jumped?

translation: Two former friends fought with blazing swords among the flames. The one who stood above cried: 'I hold the higher ground! Don't try it!' But the other leaped anyway — and was seriously wounded.
